title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - CA-1
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: CA-1 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control CA-1 in the Assessment, Authorization, and Monitoring family. The control title for CA-1 is Assessment, Authorization, and Monitoring Policy and Procedures. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: IA-2 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, IA-2, belongs to the Identification and Authentication family and is titled Identification and Authentication Organizational Users. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
